summary: The diff implements most of the required friend system features including backend data model (REQ-63), frontend friends panel with empty state (REQ-61), friend list with 1000-limit enforcement (REQ-62), friend requests section with Accept/Decline (REQ-64), and a chat bar in FriendsModePage (REQ-60). However, some details deviate from the spec.

missing_requirements.requirement: FriendRequest record type must use Text fields for requesterId and recipientId, not Principal.
missing_requirements.reason: The backend/main.mo defines FriendRequest with requesterId: Principal and recipientId: Principal, but the spec explicitly requires Text fields for both IDs.

missing_requirements.requirement: Expose sendFriendRequest(recipientPrincipal: Text) function in backend.
missing_requirements.reason: The backend/main.mo diff is truncated after the state variable declarations and does not show sendFriendRequest, respondToFriendRequest, getFriends, or getFriendRequests functions being implemented. The file summaries also do not mention these functions.

hallucinated_features.description: A migration module (backend/migration.mo) was added to migrate old actor state to new state with friendRequests and friends maps.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request did not ask for any migration module or data migration logic. It only required backend data model and functions in backend/main.mo.

hallucinated_features.description: FriendListItem.tsx shows a green online presence indicator dot for all friends.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not mention online presence indicators. Real-time features are explicitly listed as non-goals (no WebSockets or push notifications).
